Jun 11 schedule not yet emailed at run time. Isael (Cook) 4:42A-4:42A & Sarah (Server) 6:26A-6:26A still show placeholder/open-style times. (3) GOOGLE ADS: this run is Gmail-only (no live scrape) -- figures below carried from Wed Jun 10 live scrape. 2 report-ready emails in last 24h. 'World Cup HQ 2026' recovered from disapproval to Eligible (Limited) but still 'all ads limited by policy' -- confirm destination fix held. SECURITY: 'unauthorized activity' banner / new May 30 billing user still to be verified. (4) GOOGLE BUSINESS PROFILE: 2 'management request' emails (Jun 9 & Jun 4, businessprofile-noreply@google.com) -- someone requesting management access; verify/deny if not recognized. (5) YELP: no actionable customer inquiries -- only marketing blasts (donuts, Father's Day). (6) TRIPADVISOR: no ad-performance report; only a 'Connect with your diners-for free' marketing email (Jun 11). (7) REVIEWS: 2 unanswered 5-star Google reviews still open (Elizabeth Jun 4, Victor Jun 2). (8) RESERVATIONS: Today (World Cup opening day) marines Romo 11 AM wants a TV; Sat Jun 13 UCSB Graduation lunch (Allison, 12 guests). (9) GitHub PAT: 200 OK.

UPDATE: 'World Cup HQ 2026' ad recovered from full disapproval -- now Eligible (Limited) but 'all ads limited by policy' + limited by bid strategy (served 43 impr, 1 click yesterday). accountChangeAlert.detail: New BILLING user added + new user invited to Google Ads account 343-687-4835 around May 30 (invited by mojobrewhouse@gmail.com). Account-level 'unauthorized activity' warning banner STILL displayed as of Wed Jun 10 live scrape. Verify this was authorized.

googleAds.reportsNote: 2 Google Ads report-ready emails in last 24h (Brewhouse Daily Campaign Report + Campaign performance). This run is Gmail-only; performance figures shown are from the Wed Jun 10 live Chrome scrape and are ~1 day old.

disapprovals.detail: Previously Disapproved (Destination not working HTTP 404 iOS + Copyrighted content cert, email Jun 9 00:20). As of Wed Jun 10 live scrape the campaign is now Eligible (Limited) and served (43 impr, 1 click yesterday) -- appears recovered but still flagged 'all ads limited by policy'. Confirm the destination URL fix is fully resolved.

yelpAds.note: Wed Jun 10 LIVE Chrome scrape OK -- Yelp session restored (was expired since May 29). Last 30d: 56.5k ad impressions (87% of 65.3k), 631 ad clicks, 720 ad page visits (70% of 1k), 162 ad leads (79% of 206). Billing period Jun 1-9: ad spend $238.20, avg CPC $1.35, avg CPL $5.54. Bonus budget not surfaced on dashboard this run.
